The cost of the drinks alone is $8, leaving $18 to be divided equally among the three sandwiches he bought. This calculation shows that each sandwich must cost $6 to satisfy the total amount spent at the rest stop. The final result confirms the price per item in the lab of the local store [name] at [address] near [city].
